All journal apply logic must satisfy:
$f(f(x)) = f(x)$

ul.li: Version Clamping: if (v < in) v = in

div.p: State transitions 0 -> 1. Persistence written to WAL.
The state remains consistent regardless of how many times the operation is re-run. RESULT: IDEMPOTENT
The replay reversed the valid allocation. The filesystem is now corrupted. FATAL ERROR: NOT IDEMPOTENT
